title: Crispy Fermented American Jackfruit Burger
description: A midnight‑craving, plant‑based burger with fermented jackfruit and garlic, finished in a crispy air‑fry for a satisfying crunch.
instructions: Drain and pat dry the jackfruit; cut into bite‑sized pieces.
In a bowl, toss jackfruit with minced garlic, smoked paprika, sea salt, and tahini until coated.
Add chopped fermented cabbage and mix well to combine flavors.
Heat a non‑stick pan with 5 ml olive oil over medium heat; sauté the jackfruit mixture for 4–5 min, letting it caramelize slightly.
Transfer the mixture to an air‑fry basket and air‑fry at 200 °C (400 °F) for 8 min, shaking halfway through, until the edges are crispy and golden.
Toast the gluten‑free bun lightly on a skillet or in the air‑fryer for 1 min per side.
Slice the bun, spread a thin layer of tahini or vegan mayo (optional) on the bottom half.
Layer the crispy jackfruit mixture on the bun, add a lettuce leaf or tomato slice if desired, then cap with the top bun.
Serve immediately while hot for the best crunch.
Enjoy your savory, fermented, plant‑based burger!
